SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview

Class RMIVirtualView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
All Implemented Interfaces:
VirtualView, EventListener
public class RMIVirtualView extends Object implements VirtualView
the RMIVirtualVIew implements the methods of the VirtualView Interface in case the player chooses an RMI connection.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RMIVirtualView(RMIClientSkeleton cs, RMIServer rmiServer)
    RMIVirtualView is a setter method for the ClientSkeleton and of the Server.

  • Constructor Details

    • RMIVirtualView

      public RMIVirtualView(RMIClientSkeleton cs, RMIServer rmiServer)
      RMIVirtualView is a setter method for the ClientSkeleton and of the Server.
      Parameters:
      cs - is the ClientSkeleton
      rmiServer - is the Server.

  • Method Details

    • acknowledgePlayer

      public void acknowledgePlayer(Player p, String s)
      the acknowledgePlayer method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      acknowledgePlayer in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      p - is the player notified.
      s - is the message notified to the player.

    • updateLobbyView

      public void updateLobbyView(Player receiver, List<Player> joined, int lobbyNum, int maxPlayers)
      the updateLobbyView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      updateLobbyView in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      receiver - is the player receiving the message.
      joined - is the list of players in the lobby.
      lobbyNum - is the number of players in the lobby.
      maxPlayers - is the maximum number of players the lobby can contain.

    • playerAdded

      public void playerAdded(Player p)
      the playerAdded method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      playerAdded in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      p - is the player added.

    • sendInitial

      public void sendInitial(List<StandardCard> cGold, List<StandardCard> cResource, StartCard sc, List<StandardCard> hand, ObjectiveCard[] publicObjectives, ObjectiveCard[] objToChooseFrom, Resource goldDeckBack, Resource resourceDeckBack)
      the sendInitial method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      sendInitial in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      cGold - is the available gold cards the player can draw.
      cResource - is the available resource cards the player can draw.
      sc - is the player's starting card.
      hand - is the player's hand.
      publicObjectives - is the public objectives the player has to complete.
      objToChooseFrom - is the private objectives the player has to choose from.
      goldDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.
      resourceDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.

    • nowUnavailableToken

      public void nowUnavailableToken(Player p, Token t)
      the nowUnavailableToken method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      nowUnavailableToken in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      p - is the player choosing the token.
      t - is the token chosen.

    • sendPlayersInOrder

      public void sendPlayersInOrder(List<Player> players)
      the sendPLayersInOrder method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      sendPlayersInOrder in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      players - is the ordered list of the players.

    • notifyTurn

      public void notifyTurn(Player p)
      the notifyTurn method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      notifyTurn in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      p - is the player notified.

    • updatesDeckView

      public void updatesDeckView(String deck, Resource back)
      the updatesDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      updatesDeckView in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      back - is the top of the deck requested.

    • updatePlayerHandAndDeckView

      public void updatePlayerHandAndDeckView(String deck, Resource topOfDeck, int cardId)
      the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      updatePlayerHandAndDeckView in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      topOfDeck - is the new top of the deck requested.
      cardId - is the card the player has drawn and that now is in his hand.

    • updatesAvailableCardView

      public void updatesAvailableCardView(String deck, Resource topOfDeck, String listChanged, List<StandardCard> cardList)
      the updatesAvailableCardView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      updatesAvailableCardView in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      topOfDeck - is the resource of the new top of the deck requested.
      listChanged - is the new available card that has changed.
      cardList - is the new list of the available cards on the field.

    • updatesPlayersKingdomView

      public void updatesPlayersKingdomView(Player p, int c, String s, Position pos)
      the updatesPlayersKingdomView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      updatesPlayersKingdomView in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      p - is the player who places the card.
      c - is the cardId of the card to be placed.
      s - is the side of the card to be placed.
      pos - is the position where the player wants to place the card.

    • sendResults

      public void sendResults(PlayerPoints[] results)
      the sendResults method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
      Specified by:
      sendResults in interface VirtualView
      Parameters:
      results - is the points of the players.

    • playerDisconnection

      public void playerDisconnection()
      the playerDisconnection method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
